title: Doc editing permissions
excerpt: I would like to be able to create a document in the file column and be able to set editing permissions.  This seems to only be currently possible if you create the doc from the main menu and then you end up with a list o…

posts.author: skzlm (Kate Lumley)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like to be able to create a document in the file column and be able to set editing permissions. This seems to only be currently possible if you create the doc from the main menu and then you end up with a list of documents which is unnecessary. Thanks

posts.author: peta (Peta Bolger)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @skzlm

Welcome to the community! In this case, I’d recommend either Enterprise level licenses so you have full permissions control, OR, you can use the file column to connect to an existing cloud file storage such a google drive or dropbox etc. and the access permissions will stand through that account.

Hope this helps!
peta@upstreamtech.io
